reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos aquí, las chicas que atienen super atentas, los baños siempre impecables, los sánguches de ternera riquísimo, recomendados.

(Translated by Google)
We always stop here. The wait staff are super attentive, the bathrooms are always spotless, and the beef sandwiches are delicious, highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
No me hicieron el descuento.
Tengo movistar que en esta región no funciona y no hay WI FI DISPONIBLE.  NO SUPIERON DARME LA CLAVE. Para usar la APP YPF..

(Translated by Google)
They didn't give me the discount. I have Movistar, which doesn't work in this region, and there's no Wi-Fi available. They couldn't give me the password to use the YPF app.
